name: Filo Parcels
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp mild curry powder or paste
6 oz mixed vegetables (e.g., carrot, courgettes, parsnip), cut into small pieces
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onion in oil for 2 minutes.
2. Add curry powder and stir over heat for 1 minute.
3. Add the mixed vegetables, beansprouts, and coriander. Season with salt and black pepper. Mix well and set aside.
4. Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F) or Gas Mark 5.
5. Lay out the filo sheets and cut them in half.
6. Brush each sheet with melted butter.
7. Place one-eighth of the filling near the bottom edge of each pastry piece.
8. Roll up the pastry, tucking in the ends to seal securely. Brush with more butter.
9. Place the parcels on a baking sheet.
10. Bake for 20 minutes or until crisp and golden.
